title: How Much Protein Do You Need on Ozempic? Daily Targets to Preserve Muscle
introduction: Protein is one of the most important variables while taking Ozempic. If appetite is low and protein is too low, muscle loss risk rises. This guide gives practical target ranges and meal strategies.

sections.heading: 🥩 Protein Target Ranges on Ozempic
sections.content:
| Goal Context | Practical Daily Range |
| --- | --- |
| Weight loss + muscle retention | ~1.6-2.2 g/kg target body weight |
| Higher training frequency | Often near upper end |
| Low appetite phase | Prioritize protein first in each meal |

Use the [protein calculator](/tools/protein-calculator) for a personalized daily goal.

sections.heading: Protein Per Meal Strategy
sections.content:
| Meals/Day | Protein/Meal Example |
| --- | --- |
| 3 meals | 35-50 g each |
| 4 meals | 25-40 g each |
| 2 meals + 1 snack | 40-55 g at meals + 20-30 g snack |

Spreading protein helps hit targets even with reduced appetite.

sections.heading: Best Protein Sources on Lower Appetite Days
sections.content:
Useful options:

• Greek yogurt, skyr, cottage cheese
• Eggs/egg whites
• Lean fish/chicken/turkey
• Protein smoothies (as needed)

For meal examples, read [foods to eat while taking ozempic](/blog/foods-to-eat-while-taking-ozempic).

sections.heading: Text CTA: Protect Lean Mass with Daily Tracking
sections.content: Text CTA: Use Eati to track daily protein while on Ozempic. If your protein average is low, fix that first before reducing calories further.

midArticleCta: Track your daily protein in Eati while on Ozempic to preserve muscle and improve fat-loss quality.
conclusion: Protein is a non-negotiable pillar of successful Ozempic weight loss. Set a clear target, distribute intake across meals, and track your weekly average to protect muscle.
metaTitle: How Much Protein Do You Need on Ozempic? Daily Target Guide
metaDescription: Find your ideal protein intake on Ozempic to preserve muscle during weight loss, with practical per-meal targets and food examples.
targetKeyword: how much protein do you need on ozempic

faqs.question: Can I lose weight on Ozempic without high protein?
faqs.answer: You may lose scale weight, but inadequate protein increases lean-mass loss risk and can worsen body-composition outcomes.
